name: Chaka Khan
abstract: Yvette Marie Stevens (born March 23, 1953), better known by her stage name Chaka Khan ( SHAH-kə KAHN), is an American singer and songwriter. Known as the "Queen of Funk", her career has spanned more than five decades beginning in the early 1970s as the lead vocalist of the funk band Rufus.

about_quotes.speaker: Randy Brecker
about_quotes.evidence: Next thing I know we’re headlining or we’re opening the show for Chaka Khan or Parliament Funkadelic.
about_quotes.doc_title: Randy Brecker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 12, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Harold Mabern
about_quotes.evidence: Earth, Wind & Fire, Chaka Khan, whoever it is. If it’s bluesy.
about_quotes.doc_title: Harold Mabern interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 31, 2010
